message.content:
Validate RECO-801 branch by running tests. The branch fixes ESLint warnings in trending-items.service.ts.

1. Run: `git checkout RECO-801-fix-eslint-trending-items-service`
2. Run tests: `npx dotenv -e .env.test -- npx jest --config ./test/jest-unit.config.ts -- trending-items 2>&1 | tail -50`
3. If tests fail, read failures, fix test assertions to match new named param signatures, rerun
4. If fixes made, commit --no-verify and push --no-verify
5. Run: `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | head -20`
6. Switch back: `git checkout main`

Commit message: "RECO-801: fix tests\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>"
Report: PASS or FAIL.

content.text: I'll help you validate the RECO-801 branch by running tests and fixing any issues. Let me start by checking out the branch and running the tests.

    RECO-666: Enforce progress tracker updates in ai-monkey skill (#541)
    
    Replace weak "Step Completion Rules" with mechanical TRACKER GATE system:
    - Gate rule: must read tracker before starting any new step
    - Added >>> TRACKER UPDATE <<< blocks after every step (1-13)
      with exact content templates including evidence requirements
    - Added evidence requirements table per step type
    - Added skipped-step protocol (the only legal way to skip)
    - Added red-flag table for common rationalizations
    - Strengthened all checkpoint language to require reading tracker
    
    Root cause: RECO-666 execution completed correctly but tracker was
    never updated past Step 5. This makes session recovery impossible.
